commands: aws ecr get-login-password --region ap-southeast-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin $ECR

docker run -d --name nanoclaw-orchestrator --restart unless-stopped --network host --user root -e NANOCLAW_ENV=cloud -e AWS_REGION=ap-southeast-1 -e AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$AKI -e AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$SAK -e AWS_SESSION_TOKEN=$TOK -e ADMIN_USER=admin -e ADMIN_PASS='NcLaw$2026!xK9m' -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v $DOCKER_BIN:/usr/local/bin/docker:ro -v /opt/nanoclaw-data:/app/data -v /opt/nanoclaw-env:/app/.env:ro nanoclaw-orchestrator:current
docker ps | grep nanoclaw-orchestrator && echo RUNNING || echo NOT_RUNNING
